chunks.title: UNIT I: INTRODUCTION DATA, EXPRESSIONS, STATEMENTS
chunks.content: Introduction to Python, data types, variables, expressions, statements, precedence of operators, comments, modules, functions

chunks.title: UNIT II: CONTROL FLOW, LOOPS
chunks.content: Control flow, conditional statements, loops, break, continue

analysis_metadata.subject: Computer Science

Define Python functions and call them
Use Python data structures – lists, tuples, dictionaries
Do input/output with files in Python
